snov_prison.updateNotes: Fixed some bugs, more robust item confiscation and more configurables

snov_stretcher.updateNotes: Small Bugfix regarding stretcher load/unload due to Vehicle Flags

snov_cuffs.updateNotes: complete rework of interaction system, added unconscious check for search

snov_sperrzone.updateNotes: automatic npc clearing & type specific zones

snov_jobs.updateNotes: snov_jobs now runs the paycheck loop itself and pays every employee from their faction bank account every 15 minutes (requires snov_banking_billing; disable the built-in ESX paycheck).

snov_farming.updateNotes: Clearer farming error messages (depleted zones now show the correct message instead of a generic failure); fixed hidden skills leaking into the skills menu

snov_license.updateNotes: Weapon permits are now issued by the police via a new weapon_training certificate and the IssueWeaponLicense export; added SWAT authorization and config-driven job badges for more departments (ambulance, DoJ) with a new judicial card style.

snov_mdt.updateNotes: Citation tickets now state the statutory 72-hour payment deadline, and unpaid citations are reported to the DoJ (previously only report fines). Closed-filed reports are now visible in the criminal record and on warrant cards.

snov_banking_billing.updateNotes: Employee salaries are now paid straight from the faction bank account via a dedicated export used by snov_jobs.

snov_documents.updateNotes: Photocopies can now be filed into the binder and stay flagged as copies (fixed filed/extracted copies being converted to originals).
